body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Use a new artifact: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaArtifacts/pull/155

This uses thinning to create the lower resolution data, and not averaging, and it also saves a higher resolutionversion (1 degree and 0.1 degree).

I ran for 20 years, saved the output to a new IC file, and also added that artifact. Once we merge this and are sure we are happy with, I will go back and remove the other IC artifacts to avoid confusion (also in ClimaArtifacts, the Overrides toml files on the cluster...).


## To-do

title: use new artifact for soil retention parameters
